title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. ozanoniforme
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. ozanoniforme, also known as Ozanon-leaved Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. ozanoniforme include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
